text: To reset your password, navigate to Settings > Security > Change Password. You will be prompted to enter your current password and then set a new one. The new password must be at least 8 characters long and include a mix of uppercase letters, lowercase letters, numbers, and special characters. If you have forgotten your current password, click on 'Forgot Password' on the login page. A password reset link will be sent to your registered email address. The link expires after 30 minutes. If you do not receive the email, check your spam folder or contact IT support at support@company.com. After resetting, you will be required to log in again on all devices.

The company VPN allows employees to securely access internal systems while working remotely. To request VPN access, submit a ticket through the IT Help Desk portal at helpdesk.company.com. Your manager must approve the request. Once approved, you will receive an email with setup instructions and credentials within 24 hours. The company uses Cisco AnyConnect as its VPN client. Download it from the official software portal. Connect to vpn.company.com using your employee email and VPN-specific password. VPN sessions automatically disconnect after 8 hours of inactivity. For troubleshooting, ensure your internet connection is stable and that your firewall is not blocking the VPN client. Contact IT at vpn-support@company.com for further assistance.

Employees are entitled to 21 days of paid annual leave per calendar year. Leave accrues at 1.75 days per month. Sick leave is separate and capped at 10 days per year with a medical certificate required for absences longer than 2 consecutive days. To apply for leave, log into the HR portal at hr.company.com, navigate to Leave Management, and submit your request at least 5 business days in advance for planned leave. Emergency leave requests should be submitted as soon as possible with manager approval. Unused annual leave can be carried forward up to a maximum of 5 days into the next calendar year. Maternity leave is 26 weeks as per company policy, and paternity leave is 5 days. All leave requests are subject to manager approval and business requirements.

New employee accounts are typically activated within 24 hours of your joining date. You will receive a welcome email at your personal email address containing your company email, a temporary password, and a link to the self-service portal. On first login, you will be required to change your temporary password and set up multi-factor authentication (MFA). Supported MFA methods include Microsoft Authenticator, Google Authenticator, and SMS OTP. If your account has not been activated within 48 hours of your start date, contact HR at onboarding@company.com or call the IT helpdesk at ext. 1000. Account activations are handled by the IT provisioning team during business hours (9 AM – 6 PM IST, Monday to Friday).

All employees must adhere to the company's information security policy. Passwords must be at least 12 characters and changed every 90 days. Do not share passwords with anyone, including IT staff. Enable multi-factor authentication on all company accounts. Company data must not be stored on personal devices or unauthorized cloud storage such as personal Dropbox or Google Drive accounts. Use only company-approved tools for communication and file sharing. Phishing emails should be reported immediately to security@company.com. Do not click on suspicious links or download attachments from unknown senders. All company laptops are equipped with endpoint detection software and must not have the security agent disabled. Violations of the security policy may result in disciplinary action. Security awareness training is mandatory for all employees and must be completed within 30 days of joining.

Employees are issued a company laptop upon joining. Laptops are eligible for replacement after 3 years of use or in the case of hardware failure. To request a replacement, raise a ticket on the IT Help Desk portal at helpdesk.company.com with details of the issue and your asset tag number. Hardware requests for peripherals such as monitors, keyboards, mice, and docking stations must be approved by your manager. Standard approval takes 3–5 business days. Urgent replacements due to hardware failure are handled within 24–48 hours. Lost or stolen laptops must be reported immediately to IT Security and HR. Employees are responsible for company-issued hardware and may be held liable for damage caused by negligence. When leaving the company, all hardware must be returned on or before the last working day.

Employees are permitted to work remotely up to 2 days per week, subject to manager approval and role requirements. To work remotely, employees must have a stable internet connection of at least 20 Mbps, a quiet and professional workspace, and access to the company VPN. Remote work days must be scheduled in advance and logged in the HR portal. Employees are expected to be available during core business hours (10 AM – 4 PM IST) regardless of their work location. Video must be enabled during team meetings unless technical constraints prevent it. Expenses for home office setup such as a desk or chair are not reimbursable unless specifically approved by HR under the home office stipend program. Contact hr@company.com for details on the stipend program.

Only software approved by the IT department may be installed on company devices. The list of approved software is maintained in the IT portal at tools.company.com. To request installation of new software, submit a software request ticket with business justification. Approval typically takes 3–7 business days. Employees must not install unlicensed or pirated software. Commonly used tools approved for use include Microsoft 365, Slack, Zoom, Jira, Confluence, GitHub, and VS Code. Browser extensions must also be approved before installation. Unauthorized software may be flagged by the endpoint security system and removed remotely. For open-source tools, a review by the security team is required before use. All software requests are reviewed by IT and the security team.

Employees may claim reimbursement for pre-approved business expenses such as travel, meals during business trips, client entertainment, and training materials. All expenses must be submitted within 30 days of being incurred. Submit claims through the Finance portal at finance.company.com with supporting receipts. Expenses above INR 5,000 require prior written approval from your manager. Travel expenses must align with the travel policy: economy class for flights under 5 hours, business class for longer flights with senior management approval. Hotel stays are reimbursable up to INR 8,000 per night in metro cities and INR 5,000 in non-metro cities. Reimbursements are processed within 10 business days of submission. Personal expenses or non-business-related purchases are not eligible for reimbursement.

The IT Helpdesk is available to assist employees with technical issues including hardware problems, software installation, account access, email issues, and network connectivity. You can reach the helpdesk through the following channels: Online portal at helpdesk.company.com (available 24/7), Email at it-support@company.com, Phone at ext. 1000 (available Monday to Friday, 8 AM to 8 PM IST), and in-person at the IT desk on the 3rd floor of the main office. For critical issues affecting business operations, mark your ticket as 'High Priority'. Response times are: High Priority within 1 hour, Medium Priority within 4 hours, and Low Priority within 24 hours. Please include your employee ID, asset tag (if hardware related), and a detailed description of the issue when submitting a ticket.
